User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user (teacher, student, or both) in the system.

schoolName.description: The name of the school the user belongs to.

password.description: The user's password (hashed or plain as per current impl).

googleSynced.description: Whether the account is synced with Google Workspace.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

googleCalendarEventsStr.description: JSON stringified list of Google Calendar events.

googleClassroomActivitiesStr.description: JSON stringified list of Google Classroom activities.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

users/{userId}.description: The collection of users, keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.
